# Beema Health

> Beema Health is a US telehealth medical weight-loss service. Licensed providers evaluate patients online and, when clinically appropriate, prescribe GLP-1 medications — Zepbound® (tirzepatide), Wegovy® (semaglutide, injection and oral), and compounded semaglutide — with transparent cash pricing, US pharmacy fulfillment, and ongoing follow-up care.

Key facts:

- Care model: online eligibility check → medical intake questionnaire → review by a licensed provider → prescription when clinically appropriate → home delivery from US pharmacies → ongoing check-ins and refill management.
- Medications: Zepbound® (tirzepatide), Wegovy® (semaglutide injection), Wegovy® oral semaglutide, and compounded semaglutide. Compounded semaglutide is not FDA-approved and is only offered when clinically indicated.
- Prescriptions are never guaranteed; a licensed provider makes every prescribing decision.
- Pricing is transparent cash-pay, listed at https://aretide.com/pricing — no hidden fees.
- Privacy: HIPAA-aligned handling of all patient information.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://aretide.com/): what Beema Health is and how care works
- [Weight-loss treatments](https://aretide.com/weight-loss): the medication lineup and who each is for
- [How it works](https://aretide.com/how-it-works): step-by-step care process
- [Pricing](https://aretide.com/pricing): current plans and monthly costs
- [Safety](https://aretide.com/safety): side effects, contraindications, and clinical safeguards
- [FAQ](https://aretide.com/faq): common questions about eligibility, medications, shipping, and refills
- [About](https://aretide.com/about): company and clinical team
- [Contact](https://aretide.com/contact): support channels
